combat: Win head-to-head confrontations when strictly longer than opponent; cut off enemy escape routes to force collisions; veto any losing or tying exchanges. Combat decisions override all other strategies.
space_control: Maintain open space around your snake to maximize movement flexibility and prevent being boxed in; support combat by controlling board territory that traps the opponent.
food: Consume food strategically to grow just enough to stay longer than the enemy without overcommitting; prioritize food that aids combat positioning over maximum growth.
